title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 54.310 - Appropriation of moneys recovered
text:
54.310.  Appropriation of moneys recovered. — All moneys recovered in any such action shall be paid or appropriated for the use contemplated or directed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 13992) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12315; 1919 § 13228; 1909 § 11716
